# Share — user-facing flows

Locked product decisions and Play → Explore share flows.

## Product decisions (locked)

- One Play toolbar button: **Share…** (never "Update link" on the button)
- Update vs new link is explained **only inside the share dialog**
- No **Make variant** in UI — fork/lineage is silent in C++ / backend
- **Unlisted only** — no public Community listing copy in publish UI
- Share URL: `https://share.artistsindsp.com/p/{uuid}`
- **Test all three variants:** instrument, fx, midi (not Instrument-only)
- **Patch identity UI:** one card model across web + Hub — see [`HUB_PATCH_CARD_SPEC.md`](HUB_PATCH_CARD_SPEC.md)

---

---

## Key invariants

- **Share** = `POST /api/patches` (new or forked UUID)
- **Update** = `PUT /api/patches/{id}/bundle` (same UUID)
- **`GET /api/patches/mine`** is authoritative for "my shared links"
- Local `registered="true"` must stay in sync with mine list (reconcile only on **successful** mine fetch)
- UUIDs in fork paths: `juce::Uuid().toDashedString()`
- Hub install success toast: only after `loadPatch` completes (`finishHubInstallLoad`)
- Plugin-type install guard: C++ + detail view + browse cards (P2-1)

---

---

## Share a patch (from Play)

**Entry:** **Share…** in the Play header (only when the current patch can be shared).

**Logged out:**

- Stays on **Play** — sign-in overlay (*Sign in to share*)
- After sign-in → opens share form in Explore (one resize to Explore size)
- **Not now** / close → back to Play

**Logged in:**

- Explore opens directly to the share form
- Play toolbar button label is always **Share…**; tooltip may note the patch is already shared (see contradictions)

### Share form (new link)

**Header:** Cancel (returns to previous tab, usually Play)

**Visible fields:** Name, Description, Category (options match your plugin type: Instrument / FX / MIDI)

**Advanced (collapsed):** License, Tags, Include author knob presets in this share

**Live preview card** updates as you type (150 ms debounce).

**Copy:** *Unlisted link only — people with your link can install. Not shown in Community browse.*

**Submit:** **Share link** (disabled until name, description, category filled)

**Note:** *Share link includes your current sound and UI.* Unsaved edits are included.

### Update an existing shared link

Same form when the patch is already in **your** shared links list:

- Title: **Update shared link**
- Subtitle: *Same link — people who install again get this version.*
- Banner: *Updating shared link — same UUID. Existing installs keep working; reinstall gets this version.*
- Submit: **Update link**

Update vs new link is explained **only inside this dialog** — never on the Play **Share…** button label.

### Success screen

- **Patch shared** or **Link updated**
- Full patch card + share URL (`https://share.artistsindsp.com/p/{uuid}`)
- **Copy** link
- Hint for recipients (see contradictions — should say Explore, not Hub)
- **Open Shared links** | **Done** (returns to Explore browse)

Silent fork/remix (new UUID, lineage preserved) shows a distinct success subtitle; no “Make variant” control in UI.
